task.title: Unify DM and channel composer/avatar behavior

events.content: Switched channels to shared MessageComposer and avatar fallback chain: Switched channels to shared MessageComposer and avatar fallback chain

raw.question: Switched channels to shared MessageComposer and avatar fallback chain
raw.chosen: Switched channels to shared MessageComposer and avatar fallback chain
raw.reasoning: Channel used legacy MessageInput and relied on fromAvatarUrl only; DM uses MessageComposer and richer identity sources. Unifying to shared composer + fallback sources aligns behavior with minimal risk.

retrospective.summary: Unified channel UI behavior with DM: ChannelView now uses MessageComposer (attachments + mentions), channel sends now accept attachmentIds, and channel avatars now use current-user/online-user/agent/human fallbacks.
